title: Youtube Poop - Strive for Love (Part Four)
description:
The saga continues and a new villain is discovered!

Gwonam reveals a shocking secret to Link and Zelda... meanwhile Ganon is very close to completing the sacred triforce, the final piece is within his grasp!... but the King won't give it up until... *cough* you'll have to watch and find out. :)

I may have gone a bit overboard with the music in the beginning but its still good. I think the AGK's cameo more than makes up for it. :P

As always, I love getting feedback on my videos so comment, fave, rate, subscribe, etc! ;)

Ah, and I need to credit a fellow youtube pooper for some material I used! The word "master" said by Gwonam was taken from Zatchy (with permission :P) so he gets the credit for piecing it together... if you haven't seen it, go check out his "Link is Master Chief" video!

Zatchy's profile : http://www.youtube.com/user/Zatchy

Link is Master Chief : http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=2NCc6MRNViQ

Watch the entire series!
------------------------
